title: feat(mockups): Create 5 inspired school mockup landing pages

areas.summary: Complete HTML landing page with cinematic dark design, red accents, full-bleed video hero, and compressed typography inspired by Aiglon College aesthetic.
Complete HTML landing page with navy-white-gold color scheme, pill buttons, and editorial typography inspired by Beau Soleil design language.
Complete HTML landing page with minimal structure and photography-forward layout inspired by Gordonstoun visual identity.
Complete HTML landing page created for Le Rosey school-inspired mockup design.
Complete HTML landing page created for Repton school-inspired mockup design.

notable: Five complete standalone HTML landing pages created for BISP using design inspirations from five prestigious international schools (Aiglon, Beau Soleil, Gordonstoun, Le Rosey, Repton), each with unique visual identity, full JavaScript interactivity, and responsive mobile layouts.
